Headline: #47 47th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 47th/Drexel
ShortDescription: Eastbound  47 47th buses are temp. rerouted via 47th, Cottage Grove, 51st, Lake Park, 47th, and over normal route, due to street blockage near 47th/Drexel.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound  #47 47th buses are temporarily rerouted via 47th, Cottage Grove, 51st, Lake Park, 47th, and over normal route, due to street blockage near 47th/Drexel.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
